assessment.note: She names a specific blocker in alignment work: uncertainty about the right communication level, which signals low clarity with mild drag on confidence and growth.

new_queue.label: Over-communicating risk
new_queue.name: What makes something feel like noise in those cross-team updates?
new_queue.description: Clarifies the specific situations where she hesitates to communicate so the manager can remove ambiguity.

new_queue.label: Manager boundaries
new_queue.name: What boundaries from me would help most right now?
new_queue.description: Elicits the concrete support and guardrails she needs from her manager.
